embeds.title: Morimens Tier List
embeds.description: General Notes: An attempt was made to order the characters by strength within their individual tiers, but take it with a grain of salt. I don’t think Sorel is actually the worst character in the “Situational” tier, and I gave up entirely on ordering B tier due to the sheer number of characters...
